description: We use it for due diligences.
author: Dominique M.
pros: Very easy to use and fantastic customer support !
cons: Search function might be improved in the sense that make the overview easier.

description: My over all experience with the system is very good but the overall experience with the agents were EXCELLENT. Agents were very nice, friendly and knowledgeable. Today, thanks to [sensitive content hidden] for a job well done.
author: CRISTINA S.
pros: I can organize the folders and files in a the way I wanted them to appear. I like that the dates on each file is shown as it provides information to the administrator if the file is updated.
cons: I did not like the set-up where I have to create redundant folders for users with read only permission and different folder for users with full access permission.

review_title: Good Product, Secure and User Friendly
author: Kevin C.
pros: It has all the functions needed to effectively manage a dataroom. I trust the security of the datarooms.
cons: I cannot download files with watermark based on a specific user's access.

description: Reasonably easy to use, good value for money. Easy to upload, redact, share and download documents. Good Q&A module.
author: Viorel U.
pros: Good customer support, good value for money, fast delivery of USB archives. Overall experience and quality on par with the best VDR providers.
cons: The tree structure of the files could be better. As it is today, it is difficult to navigate. It is also difficult to understand where in the folders structure are located files found by searching.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So far, very great ! It is fully adapted to the way we work within our company !
author: Emeric B.
pros: Easy to manage, and a great support team ! A contract well adapted to our way of working, trainings helped our company members to use the tool daily.
cons: Probably the desktop sync tool that need a little improvement (or at least more features)

author: Timothy W.
pros: Value and ease of use, onboarding was prompt and professional. File uploading is a breeze and the layout is intuitive.
cons: Not much on cons, but I think if you have to upload very large files or data you might run into capacity or speed issues that might slow performance.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It has been good, I particularly appreciate how quickly the team responds to inquiries and solves issues in live time.
author: Joshua M.
pros: I find it's quiet user friendly, and easy to set up. I also like the ability to create as many user groups as required.
cons: I don't like the way it looks, its very boring and old fashioned, especially compared to the other offerings around.

description: My overall experience with Firmex Virtual Data Room has been quite positive. I do think that your customer service is probably your greatest strength and the people who work in that space should be rewarded for their work.
author: Patrick M.
pros: Customer support is always available and helpful. I have never experienced an issue that customer support could not address in one phone call.
cons: Perhaps the reporting could be a bit more robust. Not a huge complaint, though. There are simply times when a report request comes in from a client and I cannot find a suitable option within Firmex.

review_title: Easy decision for transaction data room
description: Great. Any questions I had were promptly and professionally answered by customer service.
author: Michael V.
pros: Ease and speed of set up. I was up and running within 15 minutes of agreement.
cons: Nothing really. Setting up specific user access (i.e. access by folder) was not as intuitive and I feel should be part of the initial user set up wizard.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience with Firmex is always great. It is incredibly user friendly and requires very little assistance from an administration perspective.
author: Kerstin S.
pros: Firmex is the most user friendly, easily accessed option. It is the most requested share option for our clients.
cons: I do not love the small scroll bar for the indexing. I find it harder to use than the previous format.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's a good VDR provider for a simple transaction / purpose.
author: Marcus M.
pros: Ease of use. Very easy to set up a VDR and send invites to individuals.
cons: Permissions are sometimes not very easy to use and customize.

description: Really good - better and cleaner offering than the main VDR competitors in the marketplace
author: Graeme T.
pros: Customer service and responsiveness is excellent - timely and helpful helpdesk
cons: The cost is always an answer for this given other platforms that are far cheaper, but this is balanced against the functionality of Firmex

description: My overall experience with Firmex has been very positive. It's a reliable and secure platform that made sharing confidential documents with internal teams and external partners straightforward. Setup was quick, support was responsive, and the system stayed stable even during high-volume use.
author: Jon D.
pros: Firmex made the due diligence process seamless during a recent M&A transaction. The speed at which we could upload, organize, and share thousands of files with external parties was impressive. The built-in Q&A feature was especially useful for managing buyer queries without losing track of any communication.
cons: There’s limited customization in terms of branding or dashboard layout. For firms that want a more tailored or white-labeled experience, Firmex feels a bit too 'one size fits all.
author_profession: IT Trainer and Systems Support Specialist

description: Very easy to use. Never have a problem with the site. Clients never have a problem uploading information.
author: Alan S.
pros: Very easy to use. Easy to give access to the site. easy to upload data. Very good support.
cons: There are no Cons. Everything is very easy to use. There are no negatives to the data room.

description: I really appreciate Firmex being so easy to use.
author: Diana M.
pros: I like how easy it is to share documents with our working group, which comprises of banks, lawyers and their client.
cons: Honestly, we can do without the "No." column. I tried turning it off, but it would still be present in the dataroom. Our documents are named with numbers in front of them. So the extra No. column can be confusing.

review_title: One of the better data rooms I've used
description: Definitely one of the better, user-friendly data rooms I have used.
author: Tori V.
pros: It is very efficient and I have never had an issue downloading files or accessing a data room.
cons: I don't like the new interface as much as the previous one. The previous interface was a little easier to use and I didn't have any issue with functionality. I don't like that when you checkbox individual files, you don't have the option to download them with the folder path. You can only download with a folder path included if you click the "Download" button without checking any files, which can be a little cumbersome downloading unneeded files. I think that needs to be updated asap.

description: Overall, firmex is a great software to use.
author: Daniel G.
pros: Clean look. Not overwhelming to use. Straightforward.
cons: Nothing to report here. It is easy to maneuver the dataroom and use this software.

description: Probably the best data room that I have used thus far.
author: Dinesh R.
pros: Easy to maneuver and locate files, folders & sections even without having any experience with the platform.
cons: The download zip structure can be improved or at least the user guide explaining it can include Q&A or frequently asked section. The multiple zip file structure is a bit confusing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: alway positive experience dealing with both the company and support.
author: Raymond G.
pros: The customer service. It is local, fast and always answers any concerns.
cons: Every software can always improve its interface.

review_title: Top-tier VDR at a fraction of the cost
description: Very satisfied! I've been using the VDR every day for the past 6 months and the product has never failed me.
author: Daviid L.
pros: Firmex is super user friendly and intuitive. The feature are easy to use and understand. The platform also updated his search engine and it's been a true game changer in locating documents.
cons: It would be helpful to be able to assign permission to specific sub-folders. Other than that, it's a great VDR!

description: It's an integral piece of software and works very well.
author: Adam P.
pros: It's easy to use for everyone and it just works. There are no issues with it that confuse people and it's secure. Great program.
cons: I wish it linked to iManage and created deal books. iManage has just recently released a program that is a competitor that does those things.

author: Kevin W.
pros: Strong support system. The Firmex employees were nice to speak to and informative.
cons: Would like if there was more optionality in creating pop-up NDAs for specific folders rather than on a per project basis.

author: Muhammad A.
pros: What I liked most about Firmex Virtual Data Room is its clarity, well-designed interface, and ease of use. Navigating through documents and folders is intuitive, making it effortless to access and organize data. Additionally, the support provided by Firmex is commendable, with responsive assistance available whenever needed. Overall, Firmex Virtual Data Room offers a reliable and user-friendly solution for secure data management.
cons: I did not encounter any significant issues or drawbacks while using Firmex Virtual Data Room.

author: Tom H.
pros: Ease of use, very intuitive and great pricing.
cons: Nothing to note on this, perhaps in some cases there could be more dedicated training

review_title: Firmex Delivers A Consistent Secure Platform
author: Tara D.
pros: The ability to create various security levels is vital to the value of this platform. The interface is user friendly which makes it essential when dealing with international clients. Lastly, we have not had any downtime with Firmex which has made the ability to share documents in real time remain seamless.
cons: I would say the ability to have a template email invitation. Maybe it is there but I have not seen it.
